title: IDEXX Laboratories to Present at the Goldman Sachs Healthcare CEOs Unscripted Conference
text: WESTBROOK, Maine , Dec. 22, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- IDEXX Laboratories, Inc. (NASDAQ: IDXX), a global leader in pet healthcare innovation, will participate in the Goldman Sachs Healthcare CEOs Unscripted Conference on Thursday, January 5, 2023. Jay Mazelsky, President and Chief Executive Officer will participate in a fireside chat at 1:15 pm ET.

title: IDEXX (IDXX) CAG Sales Growth Strong, Costs Continue to Rise
text: IDEXX's (IDXX) international revenues are primarily aided by gains in CAG and Water businesses.
